result:
**Proposed goal:** Add an interactive cell editor mode — let the user toggle cells on/off with arrow keys and Enter while paused, so they can draw custom patterns directly in the terminal before (or during) a simulation run.

This is the natural next feature: right now the only way to seed the grid is via predefined patterns or randomization. A cursor-based editor would make the simulator genuinely interactive and fun to experiment with, and it fits cleanly into the existing curses architecture.
